archetype: Archetype 1: Organic & Earthy (Modified for Financial Utility)
design_philosophy: A clean, modern mobile-first web app mimicking a native Android dashboard. Prioritizes data legibility with large typography for numbers, grounded in warm earthy F&B tones (Coffee and Maroon) against crisp white backgrounds. Functional, accessible, and appetizing.

rules: Use 'Outfit' for all screen titles and bottom navigation active states.
Use 'Manrope' for data tables, lists, and form inputs to ensure crisp number rendering.
Currency (IDR) and percentages must use font-medium or font-semibold for emphasis.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Mobile-first responsive layout with generous padding. Mimics an Android app with a fixed bottom navigation bar.
spacing_and_layout.container: w-full max-w-md mx-auto min-h-screen bg-white relative pb-20 shadow-xl sm:border sm:border-border

bottom_navigation.style: Fixed to bottom, background white, border-t border-border/50, h-16.
bottom_navigation.icons: Use lucide-react. Active: Maroon (#800000), Inactive: Muted Text (#A39A92).

floating_action_button.style: Fixed position bottom-24 right-4 or right-6, w-14 h-14 bg-primary text-white rounded-full flex items-center justify-center shadow-[0_8px_20px_rgba(128,0,0,0.3)] transition-transform hover:scale-105 active:scale-95 z-40.

kpi_cards.style: Flat background (white or muted #F9F8F6), 1px border (#E5E2DC), subtle shadow. Numbers must be large (text-3xl).

forms.style: Simple, clean inputs. Label above input, text-sm font-medium text-text-secondary. Inputs have 1px border, rounded-lg, focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 focus:border-primary.

profitability_table.style: List view for mobile rather than strict tables. Green/Yellow/Red status badges for Margin %.

badges.green: bg-green-100 text-green-700 font-bold px-2 py-1 rounded
badges.yellow: bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-700 font-bold px-2 py-1 rounded
badges.red: bg-red-100 text-red-700 font-bold px-2 py-1 rounded

header.style: Sticky top-0 z-50 bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-border/50 px-4 h-14 flex items-center justify-between.

interactive_rules.hover_states: Buttons must darken on hover (bg-primary to bg-[#660000]).
interactive_rules.active_states: Cards and list items should have active:scale-[0.98] to mimic mobile tap feeling.
interactive_rules.testing: All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

kopi_susu_aren.description: Iced Coffee Milk / Kopi Susu Aren

instructions_to_main_agent: Develop a Mobile-First Web Application mimicking a native Expo Android app. Limit main container width to 'max-w-md mx-auto' with a border to simulate a mobile screen on desktop monitors.
Implement a fixed bottom navigation bar with 6 tabs. Hide this bar on scroll down or ensure z-index is correct. Use Lucide icons.
Use a Floating Action Button (FAB) on CRUD screens (Bahan, Produk, Resep).
Format all currency as IDR (Rp 15.000). Format all percentages explicitly.
Profitability tables/lists must use explicit badge colors for margin statuses (e.g., Green for >50%, Yellow for 30-50%, Red for <30%).
Mock the data for multi-outlet (FORU Huis, FORU The Mozz, FORU Bazar) as a Select dropdown in the sticky header.
Apply `data-testid` attributes to all buttons, navigation tabs, and form elements for e2e testing.
Do NOT use HTML native date/select. Use Shadcn components heavily customized to look like modern Android/Material UI components.
Ensure the primary maroon accent color (#800000) is used distinctively on FABs and active navigation icons, maintaining a clean white background.
